{{AUTO_GENERATED_HEADER}}

USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
struct {{STRUCT_NAME}}
{
    GENERATED_BODY()

{{MEMBER_BLOCKS}}

# END_TEMPLATE

# TEMPLATE PROPERTY_BLOCK
UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite)
{{TYPE}} {{FIELD_NAME}} = {{DEFAULT_VALUE}};
# END_TEMPLATE

# TEMPLATE STRUCT_REF_GETTER_BLOCK
/// <summary>{{FIELD_NAME}} 키가 가리키는 '{{TARGET_SHEET_NAME}}' 시트의 행을 돌려준다.</summary>
template <typename TDatabase>
const {{TARGET_STRUCT_NAME}}& {{METHOD_NAME}}(TDatabase& Database) const
{
    return Database.{{DATABASE_GETTER}}({{FIELD_NAME}});
}
# END_TEMPLATE

# TEMPLATE DATABASE_FILE
{{AUTO_GENERATED_HEADER}}
#pragma once

#include "CoreMinimal.h"
{{STRUCT_INCLUDES}}
#include "{{DATABASE_STRUCT_NAME}}.generated.h"

/// <summary>모든 시트 데이터를 담는 데이터베이스.</summary>
USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
struct {{DATABASE_STRUCT_NAME}}
{
    GENERATED_BODY()

{{SHEET_ARRAY_FIELDS}}

private:
    bool bIndexBuilt = false;

{{INDEX_FIELDS}}

public:
{{GETTER_BLOCKS}}

private:
    void BuildIndex()
    {
        if (bIndexBuilt)
        {
            return;
        }

{{INDEX_BUILD_BLOCKS}}

        bIndexBuilt = true;
    }
};
# END_TEMPLATE

# TEMPLATE SHEET_ARRAY_FIELD
UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite)
TArray<{{STRUCT_NAME}}> {{SHEET_NAME}};
# END_TEMPLATE

# TEMPLATE INDEX_FIELD_BLOCK
TMap<{{KEY_TYPE}}, {{STRUCT_NAME}}> {{INDEX_FIELD_NAME}};
# END_TEMPLATE

# TEMPLATE GETTER_BLOCK
{{STRUCT_NAME}}* Find{{SHEET_NAME}}({{KEY_PARAMETER_TYPE}} Key)
{
    BuildIndex();
    return {{INDEX_FIELD_NAME}}.Find(Key);
}

const {{STRUCT_NAME}}& Get{{SHEET_NAME}}({{KEY_PARAMETER_TYPE}} Key)
{
    {{STRUCT_NAME}}* Row = Find{{SHEET_NAME}}(Key);
    if (Row != nullptr)
    {
        return *Row;
    }

    checkf(false, TEXT("'{{ORIGINAL_SHEET_NAME}}' 시트에 없는 키입니다."));
    static const {{STRUCT_NAME}} EmptyRow{};
    return EmptyRow;
}

bool TryGet{{SHEET_NAME}}({{KEY_PARAMETER_TYPE}} Key, {{STRUCT_NAME}}& OutRow)
{
    if ({{STRUCT_NAME}}* Row = Find{{SHEET_NAME}}(Key))
    {
        OutRow = *Row;
        return true;
    }

    return false;
}
# END_TEMPLATE

# TEMPLATE INDEX_BUILD_BLOCK
{{INDEX_FIELD_NAME}}.Empty({{SHEET_NAME}}.Num());
for (const {{STRUCT_NAME}}& Row : {{SHEET_NAME}})
{
    {{INDEX_FIELD_NAME}}.Add(Row.{{KEY_FIELD_NAME}}, Row);
}
# END_TEMPLATE
